label: Send Instagram DM
description: Send a direct message to an Instagram user by IGSID. Supports customer support workflows within Instagram's 24-hour messaging window. Requires instagram_business_manage_messages permission.

inputs.description: Row variable for Upload Post API key
Row variable for recipient IGSID (Instagram Scoped ID)
Row variable for the DM message text

outputs.description: Row variable to store the DM result

formSchema.label: Recipient ID (IGSID) variable key
formSchema.hint: Instagram Scoped ID of the recipient.
